docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2023 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR JUN-08-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY PLAINTIFF TO ALLOW TIME FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. CLERK: D. AU.(D506)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY JOHNSON, PAULA
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE [HEARING:APR-06-23 AT 8:30AM] FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, PAULA AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, ROBIN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED. SERVED APR-29-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, ROBIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-08-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MANI SHEIK. PLAINTIFF PAULA JOHNSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROBIN LEWIS IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MANI SHEIK; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JPT FILED BY JOHNSON, PAULA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-06-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PAULA JOHNSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROBIN LEWIS IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, PAULA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS, ROBIN $2,502.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,552.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,502.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, PAULA AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, ROBIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-02-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, ROBIN
